The All menu closed and the app navigated to the Expense Lines list view, showing a table of records with columns and a list search box; the dashboard tiles disappeared.
Pressing Enter opened the Expense Lines module as a records table; the All menu closed and the dashboard view was replaced by the list.
Within the All menu, the Cost section was collapsed, hiding the Expense Lines item beneath it while the filter still shows “Expense Lines”; the rest of the page stayed the same.
The global search field at the top now contains “Expense Lines” and a “View results” dropdown appeared; the All menu remains open with the Expense Lines result visible.
The filter text in the All menu was cleared, removing the Expense Lines result and revealing the default application list (e.g., Self‑Service, Business Applications, etc.).
